title: Indigo Soul Kitchen Tea Towels Set Multipack Cotton Towels Catering Bar Cleaning Towels Absorbent Dish Cloth Tea Towels (3, Tea Towel Mono Check 3 Pcs)
features: Absorbent Quick Drying Towels: These Dish Cloths Are Made From Highly Absorbent Material Cleaning Towels Quickly Soaks Up Spills And Dries Fast, Making Them Ideal For Everyday Kitchen Tasks, From Drying Dishes To Wiping Countertops.

Non Scratch Soft Fabric: Dish Towels Are Soft, Non Scratch Fibers, These Kitchen Towels Are Safe To Use On Delicate Surfaces, Like Glassware And Stainless Steel, Leaving A Lint Free Shine Without Scratching Or Streaking.
Machine Washable: Made For Long Lasting Use, Cleaning Towels Are Machine Washable And Hold Up To Repeated Washes. Ideal For Tackling Tough Kitchen Messes, They Maintain Their Quality Wash After Wash.

Multipurpose Reusable Towels: Perfect For Kitchen, Bathroom, And More, These Reusable Dish Cloths Handle Any Cleaning Task. Use Them For Dusting, Wiping, Or Scrubbing And Versatile For A Greener, Cleaner Home.

Available Colour: Popcorn Design, Checkered Design, Mono Check Design
